settings.heading: Trophy Customization Options — Materials, Sizes & Finishes
settings.subheading: Every way to customise your award — material, shape, size, colour, engraving, UV printing, photos, bases, gift boxes and packaging. Build exactly the trophy you want. Pan-India.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy offers full trophy customisation: choose material (crystal, metal, acrylic, glass, wood), shape, size, colour, engraving, full-colour UV printing, photos, bases, gift boxes and packaging. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: How it works
settings.text: Almost everything about your award is a choice. Pick the material (crystal, metal, acrylic, glass or wood), the shape and size, finishes and colours, and how it's personalised — laser engraving, full-colour UV printing, photos and citations. Add engraved bases, name plates, gift boxes and branded packaging. Tell us the occasion and budget and we'll show you the options that fit.

settings.title: Material & finish
settings.text: Crystal, metal, acrylic, glass, wood; many finishes.

settings.title: Shape, size & colour
settings.text: From compact desk awards to tall statement pieces.

settings.title: Personalisation
settings.text: Engraving, UV printing, photos, logos and citations.

settings.title: Bases & packaging
settings.text: Engraved bases, name plates, gift boxes and branded packaging.

settings.title: Tell us what you need
settings.text: WhatsApp, call or fill the form with occasion, quantity, material and date.

settings.title: Get options & a quote
settings.text: We share designs, matching past work and a clear quote — usually same day.

settings.title: Approve proof & advance
settings.text: Sign off a digital mockup; 50% advance via UPI/transfer/card with GST invoice.

settings.title: Made & dispatched
settings.text: Crafted in our Bangalore workshop, QC'd and tracked to your venue.

settings.question: What materials can I choose?
settings.answer: Crystal, metal, acrylic, glass and wood — each with its own look, weight and price.

settings.question: Can I add a photo or full-colour logo?
settings.answer: Yes — UV printing handles full-colour photos and logos; crystal supports 3D logo engraving.

settings.question: Can you do custom shapes and sizes?
settings.answer: Yes — custom-cut shapes and a wide size range, including tall statement trophies.

settings.question: Do you offer gift boxes and packaging?
settings.answer: Yes — presentation boxes, name tags and branded packaging on request.

settings.heading: Ready to start?
settings.text: Message us your requirement and event date — we'll guide you through and quote, usually within the hour.
